---
title: "Simple R Markdown Test Script"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This is a **simple R Markdown document** for testing purposes. It demonstrates how to use Markdown for formatting and embed R code chunks.

## Basic R Code Chunk

Below is an example of an R code chunk that calculates the sum and mean of a vector:

```{r basic-calculations, echo=TRUE}
# Create a numeric vector
numbers <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)

# Calculate the sum and mean
sum_numbers <- sum(numbers)
mean_numbers <- mean(numbers)

# Print the results
list(Sum = sum_numbers, Mean = mean_numbers)
